[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 111110101 7
1 010011011 5
2 000000000 a
3 000000000 a
4 000000000 a
5 000000000 a
6 000000000 a
7 000000000 a
